name: delcam/investment-strategy
title: DelCam: Investment Strategy
description: White section with a heading, gradient banner, and a strategy card grid. Cards are managed via ACF repeater on the page.

description.default: We acquire and build leading precision manufacturing businesses — partnering with management teams to drive sustainable, long-term growth.

ctaContent.default: We provide confidential, straightforward conversations for owners considering their next chapter.

default.title: Platform Acquisitions
default.content: We target founder-owned precision manufacturers with $5M–$50M EBITDA, building regional and national platforms through add-on acquisitions.

default.title: Operational Excellence
default.content: Our operating partners embed within portfolio companies to implement lean manufacturing, ERP systems, and workforce development programs.

default.title: Management Partnerships
default.content: We back strong management teams with meaningful equity, aligning incentives for long-term value creation alongside our capital.

default.title: Technology Modernization
default.content: Capital investment in advanced CNC, robotics, and automation to increase throughput, reduce costs, and capture higher-value work.

default.title: Geographic Expansion
default.content: Building regional density in key manufacturing corridors to share back-office resources, purchasing leverage, and customer relationships.
